tests.scenario: Browse meditation content by category from the home screen
steps: Open the application home screen
Select a meditation content category
Observe the content list shown for the selected category
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of meditation sessions relevant to the selected content category.

tests.scenario: Filter meditation sessions by selected duration
steps: Open the meditation library
Apply a duration filter such as 5, 10, or 15 minutes
Review the sessions shown after the filter is applied
tests.expected_result: Only meditation sessions matching the selected duration are displayed.

tests.scenario: View sleep related content in the sleep section
steps: Navigate to the sleep section of the application
Browse the available sleep content
Inspect the content items presented on the screen
tests.expected_result: The system displays sleep related audio options such as sleep stories, sleep meditations, or calming audio.

tests.scenario: Reach selected sleep content through onboarding
steps: Start the onboarding flow
Select a preferred sleep content option during onboarding
Continue to the next screen
tests.expected_result: The system takes the user directly to the selected sleep content without unnecessary extra steps.

tests.scenario: Distinguish free content from locked content in the library
steps: Sign in as a free user or use a non subscribed account
Open the content library
Inspect how content items are displayed
tests.expected_result: The system clearly distinguishes free content items from subscription locked items.

tests.scenario: Show subscription information after selecting locked content
steps: Sign in as a free user or use a non subscribed account
Select a content item marked as locked
Observe the message and options shown after access is denied
tests.expected_result: The system informs the user that the selected item requires a subscription and presents available subscription options.

tests.scenario: Restore playback position after a temporary interruption
steps: Start playing an audio session
Pause the app by simulating a temporary interruption such as minimizing the app or receiving a phone interruption
Resume the app and reopen the same audio session
tests.expected_result: The system restores the session at or near the last known playback position before the interruption.

tests.scenario: Display current subscription plan and renewal details
steps: Open the account or subscription management screen
Wait for the subscription details to load
Review the subscription information shown
tests.expected_result: The system displays the current subscription status, billing plan, and next renewal or expiry date.

tests.scenario: Provide a visible path to subscription cancellation
steps: Open the account or subscription management screen
Select the option to manage the subscription
Review the controls or instructions provided
tests.expected_result: The system provides a visible path to cancellation instructions or cancellation controls.

tests.scenario: Show active trial and auto renewal status
steps: Use an account with an active trial or subscription
Open the subscription details screen
Review the subscription status information displayed
tests.expected_result: The system displays whether a trial is active and whether automatic renewal is scheduled.
